summary: Comprehensive testing of 2 new LD Finance features completed. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new components and features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Budget endpoints correctly implement upsert behavior - updating existing budget for same category instead of creating duplicates
Budget comparison endpoint correctly groups expense transactions by category and month, comparing against saved budgets
PMT formula correctly implemented: min_payment = P * [r(1+r)^n] / [(1+r)^n - 1] for interest > 0, simple division for 0% interest
CurrencyInput component correctly formats numbers with dot separators (Colombian format: 1.000.000) and strips dots before sending to API
Debts form shows calculated min_payment preview in real-time when num_installments and interest_rate are filled
Dashboard 'Proyectado vs Real' section shows budget comparison with green/red indicators for over_budget status
seed_data_creation: Test users and sessions created/cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 2 new features tested and working: 1) Budget comparison (Proyectado vs Real) on Dashboard with GET/POST/DELETE /budgets and GET /budgets/comparison endpoints, 2) Simplified debt form with num_installments + interest_rate fields that auto-calculate min_payment using PMT formula. CurrencyInput component is used across all money inputs (Transactions, Savings, Debts, Dashboard budget, Admin) with dot thousand separators. Auth uses Google OAuth - authenticated pages tested via session cookie injection.
tests_passed: API health check /api/
GET /api/budgets returns empty list for new user
POST /api/budgets creates budget for a category
POST /api/budgets upsert behavior - updates existing budget for same category
DELETE /api/budgets/{budget_id} deletes a budget
DELETE /api/budgets/{budget_id} returns 404 for nonexistent budget
GET /api/budgets/comparison returns list for user
GET /api/budgets/comparison returns correct comparison data with projected, actual, difference, over_budget fields
GET /api/budgets/comparison over_budget flag correctly set when actual > projected
POST /api/debts with num_installments auto-calculates min_payment using PMT formula
POST /api/debts with 0% interest does simple division for min_payment
POST /api/debts with explicit min_payment doesn't auto-calculate
POST /api/debts without num_installments has no auto-calculated min_payment
PMT formula accuracy test with various principal, rate, and term combinations
Landing page loads correctly with AnimatedLogo
Dashboard shows 'Proyectado vs Real' budget comparison section
Dashboard add budget form shows category dropdown and CurrencyInput for amount
Debts form shows num_installments field instead of min_payment
Debts form shows calculated min_payment preview when installments and rate are filled
Transactions form uses CurrencyInput for amount field with dot separators
Savings form uses CurrencyInput for target_amount and current_amount fields

budget_comparison.details: Dashboard has 'Proyectado vs Real' section with add/edit/delete budgets. Budget comparison endpoint returns category comparison with projected, actual, difference, over_budget fields. Green/red indicators show budget status.

simplified_debt_form.details: Debts form shows num_installments and interest_rate fields. When filled, calculated min_payment preview appears using PMT formula. Backend auto-calculates min_payment when num_installments > 0 and min_payment not provided.

currency_input.details: CurrencyInput component used across all money inputs. Formats numbers with dot separators (1.000.000 format). $ prefix visible. Strips dots before sending to API (raw integer value).

pmt_formula_verification.test_case: P=10,000,000 COP, n=36 months, rate=28.5% annual
